title: Programmer Art PvP
description: The OG minecraft textures with all the best PvP tweaks!
body:
Pre 1.13 textures with all your favorite pvp tweaks:

- Low fire
- No explosions
- No smoke
- Small wind burst particals
- Small critical hits and sweeps
- Outlined ore
- No block breaking particals
- No eating particals
- Small food
- Small utils
- Small fishing hook
- Small totem and pop animation
- Side shield
- Small elytra and chestplate
- Better hit sounds
- Visible powdered snow
